mapper.select: SELECT si.*, d.drug_name, d.specification, (si.sale_num * si.sale_price) as subtotal FROM sales_item si LEFT JOIN drug_info d ON si.drug_id = d.drug_id WHERE si.order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY si.item_id

SELECT si.*, d.drug_name, d.specification, (si.sale_num * si.sale_price) as subtotal FROM sales_item si LEFT JOIN drug_info d ON si.drug_id = d.drug_id
AND si.order_id = #{orderId}
AND d.drug_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{drugName}, '%')
ORDER BY si.item_id
